consistency_flags: Bullets appear under 2 different styles (List Paragraph, Normal) — detect bullets by the numPr element, not by style name.
3 paragraph(s) are larger than body text (11.0pt) but use NO heading style ('Geoffroy de CHATEAUVIEUX', 'Education', 'And..') — a style-only parser would miss these as structural boundaries.

Companies are styled with the 'Title' paragraph style (an unusual choice) — caught explicitly by 'style==Title -> company'. One outlier company ('DIWALI PRODUCTIONS') has no Title style but is bold-no-list, caught by the trailing 'is_bold -> company' rule.
